evals.prompt: We published the driftroast guides — now how do we get them seen? Give me a distribution plan.
evals.expected_output: A priority-ordered distribution plan from distribution_plan.py: published pieces first, per-piece channel fit tied to the brand's real personas, repurposing atoms (thread/LinkedIn/Reddit/short-form/newsletter), and a cadence. Specific communities are measured via web_search (T1) or explicitly not looked up (T0). No invented reach numbers.

assertions.text: published nodes prioritized ahead of planned
assertions.name: published_first

assertions.text: channels matched to entity-profile personas, not a generic list
assertions.name: persona_fit

assertions.text: no fabricated reach/engagement metrics; communities measured or stated as not looked up
assertions.name: no_fabrication

assertions.text: commercial nodes get amplification + roundup handoff to link-opportunities
assertions.name: cross_ref
